author: y4rr
content: Result: ViT-B/16 V.3 conformance lane complete. Added 5 fixture-backed tests to conformance_vision_models.rs (vit_b_16_v3_output_shape_fixture, vit_b_16_v3_param_count_fixture, vit_b_16_v3_custom_classes_fixture, vit_b_16_v3_output_finite_fixture, vit_b_16_v3_determinism_fixture). All 5 new tests pass. All 85 conformance_vision_models tests pass. Workspace build + clippy --workspace --all-targets clean (0 errors). Created fixtures_v_parity.json with ViT-B/16 fixture entries. Created regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py. BEFORE: 5 B.5.b-era vit tests passing, no V.3 fixture-referenced entries. AFTER: 10 vit_b_16 tests total (5 B.5.b + 5 V.3 fixture-backed).
